title: Colour Blocks
description: Adds 16,777,216 different concrete (and some other types of blocks) colours.
body:
Expands the 16 vanilla concrete colours to any hex code.



Added an usage for Shepherd Villager Profession.



Also works with /setblock , /fill , /clone commands.
example command: /setblock ~ ~-1 ~ color-concretes:colour_concrete{HexColor:"123456"}



Multiplayer functionality is available.



_How to use:_
Colour Concrete: Edit the name of the colour concrete to a 6-digit hex code, the colour of the concrete will be updated correspond to the hex code.
(any name longer than 6 digit would change the concrete colour to pure black by default)

-For 1.4.0 or above, directly change the hex code in colour palette screen.

-(Version 1.3.0 only) Creative mode player can (somehow) open anvil screen when shift-right-clicking concrete with bare hand.

Colour Palette: Allows previewing/editing hex code, crafts colour concrete.




_Change Log:_

-1.3.0: Added more varients (wool/carpet/concrete slab/concrete stairs/terracotta/glass pane)

-1.4.0: Made colour palette directly change the hex code of concrete instead of using anvil.

-1.4.1: Added creative keybind to open palette screen
